steps.title: Identify the target meaning
steps.content: Words like gorgeous, resplendent, enlivened, and festoons of carnival describe visually impressive natural scenery. The word display here refers to this vivid visual exhibition.

steps.title: Match to the correct answer
steps.content:
Spectacle means a visually striking or impressive sight—the exact meaning required here. Reproduction, pretentiousness, and disguise are all unrelated to the visual grandeur on display.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
